recommendations.title: Cinderella III: A Twist in Time
recommendations.overview: When Lady Tremaine steals the Fairy Godmother's wand and changes history, it's up to Cinderella to restore the timeline and reclaim her prince.

recommendations.title: Cinderella

recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson

recommendations.title: Three Wishes for Cinderella
recommendations.overview: Cinderella, a resourceful and independent young girl, is a servant in her stepmother's house and confides in her closest friend the owl. When she comes across three magical acorns, she's granted a single wish for each one of them.

recommendations.title: Three Wishes for Cinderella
recommendations.overview: Popelka, a resourceful and independent young girl, is a servant in her stepmother's house and confides in her closest friend the owl. When she comes across three magical acorns, she's granted a single wish for each one of them.

recommendations.title: Cinderella
recommendations.overview: A fairy godmother magically turns Cinderella's rags to a beautiful dress, and a pumpkin into a coach. Cinderella goes to the ball, where she meets the Prince - but will she remember to leave before the magic runs out?  Méliès based the art direction

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Donkey Skin
recommendations.overview: A fairy godmother helps a princess disguise herself so she won't have to marry her father.

recommendations.title: Bogus
recommendations.overview: Recently orphaned, a young boy is taken in by his godmother who is shocked to realize that she can see the boy's imaginary friend: a flamboyant, French magician named Bogus.
